description:
**Milestone:** Phase 2: Component Expansion

Build hx-icon: SVG icon system with sprite support. Load sprite via Drupal libraries.yml; reference by name. Supports inline SVG and external sprite references.

**Files to Modify:**
- packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-icon/

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Inline SVG and external sprite reference modes
- [ ] Configurable sprite URL
- [ ] Sizes: xs, sm, md, lg, xl
- [ ] Color inherits from currentColor
- [ ] CSS parts: svg
- [ ] Lazy loading for external sprites
- [ ] ARIA: role=img with aria-label, or aria-hidden for decorative
- [ ] <5KB gzipped

**Complexity:** medium
title: Implement hx-icon component

descriptionHistory.description:
**Milestone:** Phase 2: Component Expansion

Build hx-icon: SVG icon system with sprite support. Load sprite via Drupal libraries.yml; reference by name. Supports inline SVG and external sprite references.

**Files to Modify:**
- packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-icon/

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Inline SVG and external sprite reference modes
- [ ] Configurable sprite URL
- [ ] Sizes: xs, sm, md, lg, xl

lastReviewFeedback:
coderabbitai: **Actionable comments posted: 9**

<details>
<summary>🤖 Prompt for all review comments with AI agents</summary>

```
Verify each finding against the current code and only fix it if needed.

Inline comments:
In `@packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-icon/hx-icon.stories.ts`:
- Around line 81-88: The Storybook render in hx-icon.stories.ts is forcing empty
string attributes for src and sprite-url which makes the hx-icon component treat
them as present (not undefined) and triggers inline mode; update the render
function bindings for src and sprite-url to use Lit's ifDefined directive so the
attributes are omitted when args.src or args.spriteUrl are undefined (import
ifDefined from 'lit/directives/if-defined.js'), leaving the component property
undefined and allowing the hx-icon inline/sprite mode logic (referenced in
hx-icon.ts) to work correctly.

In `@packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-icon/hx-icon.styles.ts`:
- Around line 8-9: The component styles include hardcoded rem fallbacks (e.g.,
in the width/height declarations inside hx-icon.styles.ts) which violate the
token-only rule; remove all literal rem fallbacks and rely solely on CSS token
variables (for example use var(--hx-icon-size, var(--hx-size-6)) instead of
var(..., 1.5rem)), and update the other size occurrences referenced in the
comment (the width/height and the other size lines) so every fallback is another
--hx-* token rather than a numeric literal; ensure no hardcoded values remain in
this file's style declarations.
- Around line 48-50: The CSS class .icon__inline in hx-icon.styles.ts uses
display: contents which can remove wrapper semantics (ARIA/role) from the
accessibility tree; change .icon__inline to a semantic-preserving inline layout
such as display: inline-flex (or inline-block) and keep any
vertical-alignment/size rules so the icon visually matches the previous layout,
ensuring the wrapper that carries role/aria-* (in the hx-icon component) retains
its accessibility semantics.
